title: Validate required fields and number bounds on Product
prompt: Build MyApp.Catalog.Product with name (string), sku (string), price (decimal), stock_quantity (integer). In the changeset: mark name, sku, price, stock_quantity as required; validate price > 0; validate stock_quantity >= 0. Write to lib/my_app/catalog/product.ex.
tier_rationale: Basic validation combinators. Easy because each rule maps directly to a single Ecto.Changeset function.
